description: Style NoteThis kurti by diva is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty look.Product DetailsPink, green and white printed v-neck kurti with a patch on the neckline that has pin tucks, lace, stitch detailing and sequins along the neckline, three quarter sleeves with pin tucks on the cuffs and split side seamsMaterial and careBlended fabricDry clean onlySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size S
